prelude.note: seed/feeds/prelude.py's build_create_payload(payload, revert_fields) consumes revert_fields verbatim (same dotted/[n] path syntax as seed/engine.set_dotpath). This base template's own names[0] (MARA/OKONKWO) is the CREATE-prelude's OWN identity, not the pre-change value -- a per-case render (not yet wired) would first text-replace MARA/OKONKWO to the case's real passenger (the real UPDATE's to-name, per the seed plan's step 4), THEN build_create_payload reverts names[0] to JOAO/MAIA for the synthetic CREATE burst only, so the later real UPDATE lands as a genuine transition. See README.md.

note: NC (Name Correction) seed base: pnr + ticket ONLY (no FDM/disruption leg, no EMD, no DDS pin) -- an UPDATE feed's CREATE-prelude parent. See README.md and docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-17-nc-seatchange-seed.md.
